reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 3 (Code Verification) triggered. Phase 03 correctly identified that gossip validation (data_column_verification.rs:535) only checks index < NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS without verifying index matches position. However, the code reading is incomplete. When data columns are reconstructed (kzg_utils.rs:366-411), the function sorts by index (line 372), performs KZG recovery, then calls build_data_column_sidecars (line 403) which creates fresh sidecars with index assigned from enumerate position (kzg_utils.rs:278). This means attacker-controlled index values are discarded and replaced with correct positional indices during reconstruction. The invariant is enforced by the reconstruction logic, not gossip validation. Reference: 01e_PARTIAL_W3B4_1771748827.json, property PROP-57888860-inv-028 requires 'sidecars[i].index == i for all i in range(NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS)'. Code enforces this during construction/reconstruction.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Each DataColumnSidecar.index must equal its positional column_index in the iteration.
